name: New Years Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the beaten egg, salt, sugar, eggs, melted butter, and orange rind in a large bowl.
2. Gradually add the flour to the mixture one cup at a time until it is stiff enough to mix by hand.
3. Turn the dough out onto a lightly floured surface and knead until smooth.
4. Shape the dough into a round loaf and place on a greased baking sheet.
5. Allow the dough to rise for 1 to 2 hours, or until doubled in size.
6. Brush the surface of the dough with beaten egg and sprinkle with slivered almonds.
7. Bake at 375°F for 45 to 50 minutes.
8. Cool on a wire rack.
